# castai_ai_optimizer_model_registry (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "castai_ai_optimizer_model_registry" "example" {
  bucket = "my-company-model-registry"
  region = "us-east-1"
  prefix = "models/"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bucket` (String) S3 bucket name.
- `credentials` (String, Sensitive) JSON-encoded credentials for accessing the S3 bucket.
- `region` (String) AWS region of the S3 bucket.

### Optional

- `prefix` (String) Path prefix within the bucket.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) Registry status.
- `status_reason` (String) Reason for the current status.
- `user_name` (String) IAM user name created by onboarding.
